summary_en: 177,900 shares acquired May 2026 for ¥128.7M (open-market). Cumulative: 1,179,500 shares for ¥975.2M against ¥1.7B / 2M-share (5.0% S/O) authorization through Oct 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief:
On 1 June 2026, Komatsu Matere disclosed the monthly progress of its treasury share acquisition program. In May 2026, the company purchased 177,900 shares on the Tokyo Stock Exchange (open-market method) for a total of ¥128.7M.

This acquisition is conducted under the authorization granted by the board of directors on 30 October 2025. The board approved an upper limit of 2 million shares (5.0% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) and ¥1.7 billion in aggregate purchase value over the period 1 November 2025 through 31 October 2026.

As of 31 May 2026, cumulative acquisitions under this program total 1,179,500 shares for ¥975.2M, representing 58.8% of the share count limit and 57.4% of the yen limit.
